meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for iPod repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: iPod Repair Winnipeg | Screen, Battery & Data Recovery
page.metaDescription: Expert iPod repair in Winnipeg. Screen replacement, battery replacement, charging issues, home button repair, and data recovery for all iPod generations. Fast service.
page.heroDescription: Still rocking your classic iPod? We repair all generations of iPods including Touch, Classic, Nano, Shuffle, and Mini.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Cracked or unresponsive iPod display? We replace screens on all models.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: iPod not holding charge? We replace worn batteries.

services.name: Charging Issues
services.description: iPod won't charge or connect? We fix charging port issues.

services.name: Home Button Replacement
services.description: Home button unresponsive? We repair and replace home buttons.

services.name: Data Recovery
services.description: Lost access to your music and photos? We offer data recovery services.

advantage_pillars.title: Data Recovery Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Retrieve your music and photos from damaged or aging iPods.

advantage_pillars.title: Repair vs Replacement Options
advantage_pillars.description: We'll help explain whether repair, replacement, or another option makes sense.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: iPod Classic
model_categories.description: Click wheel iPods with high-capacity storage.

model_categories.title: iPod Nano
model_categories.description: Compact click wheel and touchscreen models.

models_description: We repair most iPod models, including iPod Classic, iPod Nano, iPod Touch, and iPod Shuffle.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: iPod repair costs depend on the model and parts availability—as a discontinued line, some parts may be limited. Apple's iPod support documentation still provides useful guidance.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Repairing a legacy device can sometimes cost more than expected due to parts scarcity. iFixit's iPod teardowns remain a valuable reference.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense, we'll explain alternatives.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair isn't practical, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you still repair older iPod models?
faqs.answer: Yes! We repair all generations of iPods.

faqs.question: Can you recover music from a broken iPod?
How long does an iPod repair take?
faqs.answer: Most iPod repairs are completed within 1-3 days.

faqs.question: Is it worth repairing my old iPod?
faqs.answer: Many people love their classic iPods for their dedicated music experience.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on iPod repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes! Screen repair warranties vary by part quality tier.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
